headline: UniFirst Corporation Plans to Announce Third Quarter Results on July 1, 2026
summary: WILMINGTON, Mass., June 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- UniFirst Corporation (NYSE: UNF) will report its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2026 on July 1, 2026, before the market opens. In light of its pending transaction with Cintas Corporation, UniFirst will not conduct a quarterly conference call or provide an update to guidance. Headquartered in Wilmington, Mass., UniFirst Corporation (NYSE:UNF) is a North American leader in the supply and servicing of uniform and workwear progr

headline: Will Cintas (CTAS) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Cintas (CTAS) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.
